prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第66位，近年排名稳定在6 5–76区间，属于全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第92位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量处于中等偏下水平；历史投档异常记录中未出现该校，录取走势较为平稳；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A+（全国顶尖）、工商管理获评A、统计学获评A-，与物理类招生 专业中的金融学类、统计学类、精算学、经济统计学等高度匹配，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业2024年热度评估为分化观望（he at_index=65.49），较2023年小幅升温；计算机类评估为推荐但明显降温；电子信息/通信类评估为高热推荐。 江苏省2026年高考总人数约52.1万人，较2025年（约35.8万）大幅增加约45.5%；按近年比例估算，物理类考生约38.0万人，较2025年（约26.1万）增加约45.7%，考生规模显著扩 大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+5.7%）、本省物理类考生总数大幅增加（+45.7%）以 及学校声誉平稳等因素：考生大幅增加是推动位次继续后移的主要力量，小幅扩招的缓解作用有限，预计2026年位次将继续后移。预测最低位次约24968名，区间24468–25468名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 10390 → 13787 → 17907 → 20990 → 23947, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 13557 positions over 5 years, averaging about 2700 positions per year, indicating increasing competition pressure; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 23947; the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Physics Category: 2021: 43 → 2022: 51 → 2023: 32 → 2024: 34 → 2025: 35 → 2026: 37, a slight expansion of about 5.7% compared to 2025, with limited expansion, having little effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 66th, with stable rankings in the 65–76 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat total ranking is 92nd, rated as average, with short video platform exposure at a lower-middle level; no historical abnormal admission records for this university, with a relatively stable admission trend; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A+ (top in the country), Business Administration was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-, which highly match the Physics Category enrollment majors such as Finance, Statistics, Actuarial Science, and Economic Statistics, providing strong attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity evaluation of Finance/Finance/Economics majors is differentiated and wait-and-see (heat_index=65.49), slightly warming compared to 2023; Computer majors are evaluated as recommended but significantly cooling; Electronics/Communication majors are evaluated as high-heat recommended. In 2026, the total number of Jiangsu Gaokao examinees is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.5% compared to 2025 (about 358,000); estimated by recent proportions, Physics Category examinees are about 380,000, an increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025 (about 261,000), with a significant expansion in examinee scale, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+5.7%), the significant increase in the total number of local Physics Category examinees (+45.7%), and the stable university reputation: the large increase in examinees is the main force driving the continued backward shift of rankings, with the slight expansion having limited mitigating effect. It is predicted that the ranking will continue to shift backward in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is about 24968, with a range of 24468–25468.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2583 → 2717 → 2447 → 2155 → 2944, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2024, it rebounded to 2155 (best in nearly 5 years), but in 2025 it dropped sharply to 2944 (worst in nearly 5 years), a decline of about 789 places in one year, indicating obvious volatility in application popularity. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu has been continuously shrinking: 27 in 2021 → 29 in 2022 → 21 in 2023 → 16 in 2024 → 14 in 2025 → only 10 in 2026, a reduction of about 28.6% compared to 2025, a significant contraction that theoretically eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 66th, with recent rankings stable in the 65–76 range, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. Its 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 92nd overall, rated as average, with short video platform exposure at a moderately low level, showing no clear signs of increased application attention. There are no abnormal historical admission records for this university, indicating a relatively stable admission trend. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A+ (top nationally), Business Administration rated A, and Statistics rated A-, highlighting outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, which highly matches the enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, Business Administration, and Accounting, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Finance/Financial/Economics majors was assessed as divergent and wait-and-see, with a slight warming compared to 2023, but still in a state of divergence overall. Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors were assessed as recommended, with high social recognition. In 2026, the total number of Jiangsu Gaokao examinees is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.5% compared to 2025 (about 358,000). Estimated by recent proportions, History Category examinees are about 141,000, an increase of about 45.6% compared to 2025 (about 97,000), with a notable expansion in examinee scale, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-28.6%), the notable increase in the number of History Category examinees in the province (+45.6%), and the stable university reputation: the enrollment reduction theoretically shifts the ranking upward (easier to enter), but the large increase in examinees partially offsets the reduction effect, and the ranking in 2025 has already abnormally dropped, so it is expected to rebound somewhat in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2389, with a range of 1959–2819.
